lyrics.text: Look at what you've done
Stand still, fallin' away from me
lyrics.translation: 不为所动 将我离弃

lyrics.text: When it takes so long,
Fire's out, what do you want to be?
lyrics.translation: 纸包不住火 谎言燃尽 你怎么说?

lyrics.text: I'm holdin' on,
Myself was never enough for me
lyrics.translation: 过去的我 还力有未竭?

lyrics.text: Gotta be so strong
There's a power in what you do,
lyrics.translation: 你的作为 驱使着我

lyrics.text: Now, every other day I'll be watching you
lyrics.translation: 而现在 我会观视着你

lyrics.text: Oh-oh, Oh-oh,
lyrics.translation: 哦 哦 哦 哦

lyrics.text: Show you what it feels like,
Now I'm on the outside
Oh-oh,
We did everything right, now I'm on the outside
lyrics.translation: 感情没裂洞 现在我却成了局外人

lyrics.text: Oh-oh,
Show you what it feels like,
lyrics.translation: 也让你体验一下这种感受

lyrics.text: Now I'm on the outside
lyrics.translation: 我为局外人 看你怎么办

lyrics.text: Oh-oh,
We did everything right, now I'm on the outside
lyrics.translation: 原本都还好好的 现在我却成了局外人

lyrics.text: Though you give me no reason
For me to stay close to you,
Tell me what lovers do
lyrics.translation: 告诉我 要怎么做呀

lyrics.text: How are we still breathing?
It's never for us to choose,
I'll be the strength in you.
lyrics.translation: 我要成为你力量的来源

lyrics.text: I'm holdin' on (I'm holdin' on)
Myself was never enough for me
lyrics.translation: 过去的我 还力有未逮

lyrics.text: Gotta be so strong
There's a power in what you do,
lyrics.translation: 你的作为 驱使着我

lyrics.text: Now, every other day I'll be watching you
lyrics.translation: 而现在 我会观视着你

lyrics.text: Oh-oh, Oh-oh,
lyrics.translation: 哦 哦 哦 哦

lyrics.text: Show you what it feels like,
Now I'm on the outside
Oh-oh,
We did everything right, now I'm on the outside
lyrics.translation: 感情没裂洞 现在我却成了局外人

lyrics.text: Oh-oh,
Show you what it feels like,
Now I'm on the outside
Oh-oh,
We did everything right, now I'm on the outside
lyrics.translation: 感情没裂洞 现在我却成了局外人

lyrics.text: I'll show you what it feels like,
Now I'm on the outside (eeeey)
I'll show you what it feels like,
Show you what it feels like,
Now I'm on the outside
Oh-oh,
We did everything right, now I'm on the outside
lyrics.translation: 感情没裂洞 现在我却成了局外人
